entry.title: Magical Rectangle
entry.content:
Login

Home

Album

🌟 Built with

• JavaScript
• React
• Express
• OpenCV
• Amazon Web Services

🌟 Components

• Object Detection —> OpenCV (opencv4nodejs)
• Database —> Dynamodb
• Image Storage —> S3
• Deployment —> EC2

🌟 Features

• Authentication (login / signup / logout)
• Upload images and get object detection results (where colourful rectangles appear)
• Browse all processed images in the album

📌 Note

• Objects’ classes that can be detected are listed here
• All images used for object detection in the example were randomly picked from Google Image
• Original wallpaper was from Google Image and then modified by myself

entry.title: Second Buy
entry.content:
Index

Profile

Sell / Edit

Detail

Comment / Reply

Notification

🌟 Built with

• JavaScript
• HTML & CSS
• Node.js
• Express
• MongoDB
• Heroku

🌟 Components

• Database —> MongoDB
• Deployment —> Heroku

🌟 Features

Authentication:
• login / signup / logout

Index Page:
• Browse posts of second-hand books on sale published by other users
• Search sale information of specific second-hand books by the search bar
• Brief profile information on side

Profile Page:
• Edit username and contact information
• Check the number of own books on sale / the number of own books sold
• Browse brief information of own posts
• Other users can check the profile but only in guest view (editing functions are hidden)

Sell Book Page (also Edit Book information Page):
• Create a new post by filling the information form and upload the picture of the book
• Edit one existing post later
• Mark the book ‘on sale’ or ‘sold’

Book Detail Page:
• Show the owner of the book and other books information
• Other users can claim the book by clicking “I want this” to send a notification to the owner
• Comment and reply under the post

Notification Page:
Receive notifications if
• some users want to buy certain own books
• some users commented under certain own posts
• some users replied own comments under certain posts

📌 Note

• Information of books in the example were randomly selected from U of T library
• Background image (and alt image in the ‘upload the picture of the book’ area) was from Google Image
• Modified from my course project. Thanks to teammates Alex, Rita, Hlib and our instructor Mark

entry.title: LAN chatroom
entry.content:
🌟 Built with

• C

🌟 Components

Clients:
• Send requests to the server and get responses from the server
• Multi-threads
-detect user’s inputs
-receive server’s responses

Server:
• Load and store users’ / sessions’ / invitations’ information
• Act as the intermediate between clients
-create a new thread for each newly connected client
-receive client’s requests and reply responses on every thread

🌟 Features

Authentication:
• login / logout

Session (Chatroom):
• Users can create a new session or join one existing session
• Multiple users can group-chat in one session
• Users can join multiple sessions and chat with multiple groups of people
• Users can leave the session

Invitation:
• Invite other users to join one existing session
• Accept the invitation and join the group chat
• Decline the invitation

Query:
• Users can query the list of online users and valid sessions from the server

📌 Note

The example ran clients and the server in one same PC thus using 127.0.0.1 as the server IP address.
It can be altered as other IP address if the server ran on the different PC.

entry.title: Fakestagram
entry.content:
🌟 Built with

• Java
• Android Studio
• Google Firebase

🌟 Features

• Authentication (login / signup / logout)
• Browse / Comment / Reply global photo posts
• Take photos, auto-add tags and upload to own album
• Browse / Delete own photos

entry.title: Art Style Transfer
entry.content:
Home Page

Home Page

Example: transfer to Starry Night style

Example: transfer to The Great Wave off Kanagawa style

Example: transfer to Mosaic style

Example: transfer to Cubism style

Example: transfer to Udnie style

Example: transfer to Feathers style

Example: transfer to The Scream style

Album

Detail of one processed photo

🌟 Built with

• Python
• Flask
• Amazon Web Services
• Tensorflow

🌟 Components

• Style Transfer —> Tensorflow (Fast Neural Style)
• Database —> Dynamodb
• Image Storage —> S3

🌟 Features

• Authentication (login / signup / logout)
• Chose one of the art styles and perform style transfer to users’ uploaded photos
• Browse all saved processed photos and their full-resolution versions in the album
• Delete one selected photo per time, or delete all photos one time in album

📌 Note

• Fast Neural Style models are in reference to here
• All images used for style transfer examples were randomly selected from Google Image

entry.title: Breakout Ball
entry.content:
•　GUI is built on JFrame / JPanel
•　Use KeyListener / ActionListener to detect keyboard input (right / left)
•　Reference
